bugs.title: Incomplete request processing
bugs.evidence: I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent did not ask for the medication name or dosage, which is essential for processing a refill request, leading to an incomplete response to the patient's needs.
bugs.recommendation: Ensure the agent asks for the medication name and dosage before concluding the call.

bugs.title: No clear next steps provided
bugs.evidence: I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you.
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent should clearly state what happens next and when the patient can expect to hear back, which was not provided.
bugs.recommendation: Incorporate a clear explanation of the next steps and expected timelines for follow-up in the agent's script.

overall_notes: The agent failed to adequately process the refill request by not obtaining necessary information about the medication and dosage. Additionally, there was no clear communication regarding the next steps, which affects user trust and satisfaction.
